/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pipeann_gorgeous_ground_truth.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pipeann_gorgeous_ground_truth.dir/src/ground_truth_main.cpp.o -o pipeann_gorgeous_ground_truth  libpipeann_gorgeous_core.a libpipeann_original_core.a /usr/lib64/libopenblas.so /usr/lib64/gcc/x86_64-suse-linux/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib64/libpthread.a /usr/lib64/libaio.so
